items.description:
Smooth and rich Segafredo Latte Macchiato is a delicious sip from the world of Italian coffee.
This milk coffee drink is a combination of strong Italian dark-roast coffee and fresh milk.

Segafredo Latte Macchiato is also well suited for a more refined taste, as it contains on average 30% less sugar than ready-made milk coffee drinks.

Usage: Shake well and enjoy chilled!

Storage: Store unopened at room temperature. Once opened, keep refrigerated and consume within 3 days.

items.title: Coffee drink  Vanilla Espresso 235ml
items.description:
Intense and rich Segafredo Vanilla Espresso is a combination of strong Italian dark-roast coffee, vanilla, and fresh milk.

Usage: Shake well and enjoy chilled!

Storage: Store unopened at room temperature. Once opened, keep refrigerated and consume within 3 days.

items.title: Coffee drink Caramel Macchiato 235ml
items.description:
Smooth and velvety Segafredo Caramel Macchiato is a strong Italian-style dark roast coffee.
A pleasant combination of fresh milk and delicious caramel.

A ready-to-drink coffee beverage for coffee lovers and connoisseurs.

Usage: Shake well and enjoy chilled!

Storage: Store unopened at room temperature. Once opened, keep refrigerated and consume within 3 days.

items.title: JINRO Plum Soju 360ml
items.description:
Jinro Plum Soju is a traditional Korean distilled beverage crafted from a rice distillate, offering a smooth and slightly sweet flavor profile. 

With an alcohol content of 13% and a sweet plum taste, it provides a balanced taste that is both refreshing and enjoyable.

items.description:

With an alcohol content of 13% and a sweet peach taste, it provides a balanced taste that is both refreshing and enjoyable.

sections.title: WINE  Red, white and sparkling wines – perfect with sushi or for light enjoyment. (18+, contains alcohol)

items.title: SERENA MERLOT VENETO IGT 22 12% 75CL
items.description:
Italy, dry
Alcohol content: 12% vol

items.title: Serena Spumante Gran Cuvée Extra Dry (75cl)
items.description:
Blend of white grapes (Glera, Chardonnay), Italy. A light and balanced sparkling wine. The bouquet shows pear, apple and delicate floral notes. Off-dry on the palate with gentle sweetness, fine bubbles and a refreshing, pleasant finish. Perfect as an aperitif and with light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Lenz Moser Servus Weiss 2020 (25cl)
items.description:
Blend of white grapes (Grüner Veltliner, Welschriesling, Rivaner), Austria. A light and fresh white wine. The bouquet shows citrus, apple, pear with light herbal and spicy notes. Dry on the palate with lively acidity, clean and refreshing, with a soft fruity finish. Perfect with sushi, light dishes and fish.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Lenz Moser Servus Rot 2021 (25cl)
items.description:
Blend of red grapes (Zweigelt, Blauer Portugieser), Austria. A soft and easy-drinking red wine. The bouquet shows cherry, red berries and light spicy notes. Dry on the palate with soft tannins, balanced and smooth, with a pleasant fruity finish. Perfect with meat and appetizers.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Serena Prosecco DOC Spumante Extra Dry (20cl)
items.description:
Blend of white grapes (Glera, Chardonnay), Italy. A light and balanced sparkling wine. The bouquet shows pear, apple and delicate floral notes. Off-dry on the palate with gentle sweetness, fine bubbles and a refreshing, pleasant finish. Perfect as an aperitif and with light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Serena Gran Cuvée Spumante (75cl)
items.description:
Blend of white grapes (Glera, Chardonnay), Italy. A light and elegant sparkling wine. The bouquet shows pear, apple, citrus and delicate floral notes. Off-dry on the palate with gentle sweetness, fine bubbles and a refreshing, balanced finish. Pairs especially well with sushi rolls, tempura and light sushi sets.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Bottega Brut Millesimato Spumante (75cl)
items.description:
Blend of white grapes (mainly Glera), Italy. A dry sparkling wine with a fresh, crisp character. The bouquet shows citrus, green apple and delicate floral notes. Dry on the palate with fine bubbles, bright acidity and a clean, crisp finish. Perfect with sushi, seafood and fish.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Desom Millésimé Crémant de Luxembourg Brut 2021 (75cl)
items.description:
Blend of traditional grapes (Chardonnay, Pinot Blanc), Luxembourg. A sparkling wine made using the traditional method. The bouquet shows citrus, white fruits, delicate floral notes and hints of fresh pastry. Dry on the palate with fine creamy bubbles, fresh acidity and an elegant, clean finish. Perfect with sushi, seafood and light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Chablis Saint Martin 2022 75cl
items.description:
Chardonnay, Burgundy (Chablis). A classic mineral style with citrus, white orchard fruit and flinty notes. Dry, precise and high in acidity, with a long, clean finish. Perfect with oysters, seafood and sushi.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Desom Riesling Côtes de Remich 2019 (12,5% / 100cl)
items.description:
Riesling, Luxembourg (Moselle). A fresh and vibrant white wine style. The bouquet shows lemon, lime, peach and delicate floral notes with subtle minerality. Dry on the palate with lively acidity, clean and refreshing, with a crisp, precise finish. Perfect with sushi, fish and light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Serena Pinot Grigio DOC Delle Venezie (75cl)
items.description:
Pinot Grigio, Italy (Delle Venezie DOC). The bouquet shows pear, green apple, citrus and light floral notes. Dry, light-bodied with gentle acidity and a clean, refreshing finish. Perfect with sushi, fish and light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Sileni Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough 2022 (75cl)
items.description:
Sauvignon Blanc, New Zealand (Marlborough). Intense and vibrant aromas of passion fruit, lime, gooseberry and fresh herbal notes. Dry, juicy and high in acidity, crisp and refreshing with a clean citrus finish. Perfect with sushi, seafood and salads.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Louis Latour Domaine de Valmoissine Pinot Noir 2024 (75cl)
items.description:
Pinot Noir, France. An elegant Burgundy-style red wine. The bouquet reveals cherry, raspberry, red berries and light spicy notes. Dry, smooth and refined on the palate, with delicate tannins, fresh acidity and a clean, subtle finish. Perfect with chicken, meat and light dishes.
Contains alcohol. 18+

items.title: Takara Plum Wine (Umeshu) 10% (75cl)
items.description:
Japanese fruit wine made from plums. The bouquet shows ripe plum, honey and light floral notes. Sweet and smooth on the palate, with a soft texture and balanced refreshing acidity. Perfect with sushi, desserts or enjoyed on its own over ice.
Contains alcohol. 18+
